allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'ga' in k.lower\(\) or 'analytics' in k.lower\(\) or 'google' in k.lower\(\)}\)")
PowerShell(Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'mysql|maria|sql' -or $_.DisplayName -match 'mysql|maria|sql' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status)
